name: auth.authStatus
description: Check current authentication status, including token validity, granted scopes, and expiry information. Validates stored tokens against the authorization server.

client_id.description: OAuth client identifier to check tokens for. Defaults to guideai-mcp-client.

validate_remote.description: Whether to validate access token with authorization server (vs. checking local expiry only).

is_authenticated.description: True if valid access token exists and is not expired.

access_token_valid.description: Whether access token is present and valid (not expired).

refresh_token_valid.description: Whether refresh token is present and valid (not expired).

client_id.description: Client identifier for which tokens are stored.

scopes.description: OAuth scopes granted to the stored access token.

expires_in.description: Seconds until access token expires (negative if already expired).

expires_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when access token expires.

refresh_expires_in.description: Seconds until refresh token expires (negative if already expired).

refresh_expires_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when refresh token expires.

token_storage_type.description: Storage backend used for tokens (keychain preferred, file fallback).

token_storage_path.description: Keychain service name or file path where tokens are stored.

needs_refresh.description: True if access token is expired but refresh token is valid (should call auth.refreshToken).

needs_login.description: True if no valid tokens exist (should call auth.deviceLogin).

last_validated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last remote validation (if validate_remote was true).
